hero.headline: Arrange your FREE Home Survey with Stamford's most trusted team for 25 years

cta.headline:
Windows, Doors, and Conservatories
Want a free, no-obligation home survey?

benefits.title: 25 Years of Trust
benefits.text: Stamford's own since 2001. FENSA certified with a 10-year insurance-backed guarantee on every installation.

benefits.title: Visit Our Showroom
benefits.text: See windows, doors, and living spaces in person at Tinwell Business Park — no appointment needed.

intro: Draughty windows that rattle in the wind. Misted double glazing you've been meaning to sort for years. A conservatory that's freezing in December and a greenhouse in July. Sound familiar?

Every month you wait, you're paying to heat the outside — and putting up with a home that doesn't look or feel the way it should. The national companies will send a salesman who won't leave your kitchen for three hours. The one-man-bands will promise the world and never call back.

Orchard has been transforming homes across Stamford, Rutland, and Peterborough for over 25 years. No scripts. No pressure. Just honest advice from Mark, a fixed price on one page, and a 10-year guarantee on every installation. Visit our Tinwell showroom or book a free home survey — and see the difference for yourself.
whyChooseUs.headline: Why Stamford Homeowners Choose Orchard

items.text: 25 years in Stamford — your neighbours' most trusted home improvement company, with a 10-year insurance-backed guarantee.
No-pressure home surveys — Mark visits, gives honest advice, and leaves you a fixed price on one page. No hard sell.
Tinwell showroom — touch the products, compare materials, and decide with confidence before you commit.
FENSA certified — every window and door installation meets the highest building regulation standards.

steps.subtext: We serve homeowners across Stamford, Rutland, Peterborough, and surrounding Lincolnshire and Cambridgeshire.

reviews.name: R. Cutts
reviews.text: Very professional and courteous. We wouldn't hesitate to recommend Orchard to family and friends.

reviews.name: J. Corby
reviews.text: Polite, clean, and tidy. The team were friendly and professional — a real credit to the company.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Our energy bills dropped noticeably after the new windows. The house feels warmer, quieter, and looks ten years newer.

reviews.name: David P.
reviews.text: Mark gave us honest advice with no hard sell. One price, one page — refreshing after our experience with a national company.

notInArea.heading: We're not in your area just yet
notInArea.message: We currently serve homeowners across Stamford, Rutland, Peterborough, and surrounding areas. Follow us on Facebook to stay updated — we may be expanding to your area soon.
